reviews.comment:
Depende de las estaciones la atencion va de muy buena a malisima, baños y shop en gral 4☆, pero los que atienden los surtidores son reeeelerdos y poco pensantes, ayer cola de autos por 40min a 40°, y ni te informan que tienen un problema y van a tardar mas aun porque habia un problema electrico, y te dejan esperando como si nada.

(Translated by Google)
Depending on the station, the service ranges from very good to terrible. The restrooms and shop are generally 4 stars, but the pump attendants are incredibly slow and inconsiderate. Yesterday, there was a line of cars for 40 minutes in 40°C heat, and they didn't even inform you that they had a problem and it would take even longer because of an electrical issue, and they just left you waiting as if nothing was wrong.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJX196Sk9nEAE

reviews.comment:
Emblemática en Mardel sobre avenida Colón. Exlente servicio y calidad .Playeros muy serviciales y educados . Muy ordenado y rápido servicio .El Full muy completo y bien atendido . Baños siempre limpios.

(Translated by Google)
A landmark in Mar del Plata on Avenida Colón. Excellent service and quality. Very helpful and polite staff. Very organized and fast service. The full package is very complete and well-run. Restrooms are always clean.
